description_long: This is a compact, modern bullpup-style rifle with a matte black finish, designed for urban tactical use. The rifle features a short barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle, and a prominent handguard with ventilation holes for heat dissipation. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned behind the trigger assembly, characteristic of bullpup designs for improved maneuverability. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, including a front post and a rear aperture, both mounted on the top rail. The stock is integrated into the main body, providing a solid and ergonomic shoulder rest. The overall construction appears robust, with polymer and metal components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with a short barrel, detachable box magazine, and integrated iron sights, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with a flash hider and the narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length, bullpup configuration, detachable magazine, and both iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger, and details of the handguard and stock.
